response.title: ZAREEN'S, Palo Alto - Photos & Restaurant Reviews... - Tripadvisor
response.snippet: Palo Alto Restaurants. Zareen's.Zareen’s (Palo Alto) is a local favorite for Pakistani and North Indian comfort food, from sizzling kababs to creamy curries and weekend Halwa Puri brunch. The menu is inclusive, with plenty of vegetarian and gluten-free options clearly marked.

response.snippet: Zareen's Palo Alto in Palo Alto rated 4.9 out of 5 on Restaurant Guru: 8180 reviews by visitors, 563 photos. Explore menu, check opening hours and book a table.
response.content: Zareen's Palo Alto, Palo Alto - Restaurant menu, prices and reviews Home / USA / Palo Alto, California / Zareen's Palo Alto Zareen's Palo Alto Add to wishlist Add to compare Share 8411 votes #6 of 453 restaurants in Palo Alto Closes soon: 12AM Updated 12 days ago All photos Food Interior Dessert Drink Exterior Add a photo 563 photos Zareen's Palo Alto All photos Food Interior Dessert Drink Exterior The menu of Indian and Pakistani cuisines provide flavorsome food at this restaurant. Nicely cooked tandoori chicken tikka , cheese naans and garlic naans have an appetizing taste. Zareen's Palo Alto offers you to try tasty grilled mango , mango dessert and mango pudding . This place is known for good marsala , beer or indian wine . You will appreciate delicious masala chai , mango lassi or chai latte at this place. Food delivery is an important advantage of this spot. The knowledgeable staff welcomes guests all year round. The professional service is something these restaurateurs care about. This restaurant offers you fair prices for yummy meals. The beautiful decor and enjoyable atmosphere let visitors feel relaxed here. Google users awarded Zareen's Palo Alto 4.5.
